question: For Clinical Study NCT03976375 titled 'Efficacy and Safety of Pembrolizumab (MK-3475) With Lenvatinib (E7080/MK-7902) vs. Docetaxel in Participants With Metastatic Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) and Progressive Disease (PD) After Platinum Doublet Chemotherapy and Immunotherapy (MK-7902-008/E7080-G000-316/LEAP-008)': What was the primary endpoint of this study, how was it measured (e.g., PFS at 12 months, response rate), and what was the predefined success threshold

For Clinical Study NCT03594747 titled 'A Study of Tislelizumab in Combination With Chemotherapy Versus Chemotherapy in Advanced Lung Cancer': What statistical methods were used for the primary analysis (e.g., Kaplan-Meier, Cox regression, ITT vs. per-protocol), including multiplicity corrections

For Clinical Study NCT04205812 titled 'Platinum-Based Chemotherapy With/Without INCMGA00012, an Anti-PD-1 Antibody, in Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer': Summarize the key secondary endpoint findings with hazard ratios, odds ratios, or mean differences, and note any significant adjustments

For Clinical Study NCT03521154 titled 'A Global Study to Assess the Effects of Osimertinib Following Chemoradiation in Patients With Stage III Unresectable Non-small Cell Lung Cancer (LAURA)': Did this clinical study incorporate any AI innovations, such as AI-driven patient recruitment, Ai-drug discovery, predictive modeling for outcomes, or image analysis for endpoints

For Clinical Study NCT03829332 titled 'Efficacy and Safety Study of Pembrolizumab (MK-3475) With or Without Lenvatinib (MK-7902/E7080) in Adults With Programmed Cell Death-Ligand 1 (PD-L1)-Positive Treatment-naïve Nonsmall Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) (MK-7902-007/E7080-G000-314/LEAP-007)': What were the exact inclusion criteria for participants in this clinical trial, including age range, disease stage, and required biomarkers

For Clinical Study NCT03515837 titled 'Study of Pemetrexed + Platinum Chemotherapy With or Without Pembrolizumab (MK-3475) in Adults With Tyrosine Kinase Inhibitor- (TKI)-Resistant Epidermal Growth Factor Receptor- (EGFR)-Mutated Metastatic Non-squamous Non-small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC) (MK-3475-789/KEYNOTE-789)': Describe the trial design: Was it randomized, controlled, blinded (single/double), parallel or crossover, and what was the sample size per arm

For Clinical Study NCT03703297 titled 'Study of Durvalumab + Tremelimumab, Durvalumab, and Placebo in Limited Stage Small-Cell Lung Cancer in Patients Who Have Not Progressed Following Concurrent Chemoradiation Therapy': What were the most common adverse events (grade 3+), their incidence rates by arm, and any serious events leading to discontinuation

For Clinical Study NCT03663205 titled 'A Study Evaluating the Efficacy and Safety of Tislelizumab Versus Chemotherapy in Advanced Non-Squamous Non-small Cell Lung Cancer': What were the primary endpoint results, including point estimates, confidence intervals, p-values, and whether the primary objective was met

For Clinical Study NCT03521154 titled 'A Global Study to Assess the Effects of Osimertinib Following Chemoradiation in Patients With Stage III Unresectable Non-small Cell Lung Cancer (LAURA)': What statistical methods were used for the primary analysis (e.g., Kaplan-Meier, Cox regression, ITT vs. per-protocol), including multiplicity corrections

For Clinical Study NCT03594747 titled 'A Study of Tislelizumab in Combination With Chemotherapy Versus Chemotherapy in Advanced Lung Cancer': Summarize the key secondary endpoint findings with hazard ratios, odds ratios, or mean differences, and note any significant adjustments
